installCommand: sh -c 'if [ -d client ]; then npm install --include=dev --workspace=client --workspace=server --include-workspace-root; else cd .. && npm install --include=dev --workspace=client --workspace=server --include-workspace-root; fi'
buildCommand: sh -c 'if [ -d client ]; then npm exec -w client -- vite build && rm -rf dist && cp -r client/dist dist; else node ../node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build; fi'
